title: erigeron circulis
intro: Erigeron circulis, also known as Fleabane, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin irritations and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Erigeron circulis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and aiding in the healing process of wounds. Erigeron circulis can be prepared as a herbal tea, salve, or infused oil, making it a versatile remedy for various health issues.
